name: example-design-system-bundle
description: A tiny, versioned policy bundle (DOWNSTREAM.md §3). Each rule is parameterized SQL that SELECTs violation rows (zero rows = pass); the columns fact_id, file, line, col, message are the contract the evaluator maps to SARIF. In a real system this bundle is signed and a repo pins the version it is evaluated against.

rules.title: Color is not a design token
rules.help: Use a design-system color token instead of a raw value. Unresolved colors are routed to needs-review, never failed here.

rules.title: Arbitrary Tailwind value bypasses the scale
rules.help: Replace bracketed arbitrary values (e.g. text-[#123456], w-[13px]) with a scale utility.

rules.title: Inline style declaration
rules.help: Move inline styles into a stylesheet or a token-driven class.

rules.title: Unresolved value needs manual review
rules.help: factlas could not resolve this value statically; a human or a gated Tier-2 check should decide. Never silently passed or failed.
